author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.5.0: Added OAuth web portal with SPA dashboard. Batch scanning for large installs. State-change self-verification eliminates false alarms on event-only devices. Offline threshold default increased to 7 days. Location assignment, Konnected support, Deep Verification Scan, Repeat Drops detection, and expanded Problem Devices page.
